mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_order (order_no, user_id, user_name, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{order.orderNo}, #{order.userId}, #{order.userName}, #{order.totalAmount}, #{order.status}, #{order.receiverName}, #{order.receiverPhone}, #{order.receiverAddress}, #{order.createTime}, #{order.updateTime}, #{order.deleted})
